pi_items.source: setup_task.sh generates indices wazuh-alerts-2023.01.01 through 05 and export_result.sh verifies the deletion of indices matching wazuh-alerts-2023.*

privileged_info_summary: I verified that the task operates on synthetically generated Wazuh indices created by the setup_task.sh script, which include five legacy indices matching the pattern 'wazuh-alerts-2023.*' and a current index 'wazuh-alerts-4.x-[DATE]' that has a 'read_only_allow_delete' block applied. I also confirmed that the indexer URL 'https://localhost:9200' and credentials ('admin' / 'SecretPassword') exactly match the task's script configuration (task_utils.sh).
